## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, and `npm test` all pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes (against fixtures, not real data)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No new network calls and no writes to the Apple Stocks data (read-only)
- [ ] Any symbol input is validated; external commands use `execFile` (no shell)
